# Feature Intake Template

## Request

Summarize the human request in one paragraph.

## Input Type

New spec | spec slice | change request | maintenance | harness improvement

## Lane

Tiny | normal | high-risk

## Risk Flags

| Risk flag | Applies? | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Wallet/signing | no | |
| Authorization | no | |
| Data model | no | |
| External systems | no | |
| Public contract | no | |
| Existing behavior | no | |
| Weak proof | no | |
| Multi-domain | no | |

## Required Docs

- Product:
- Story:
- Decisions:
- Architecture/domain:
- Validation:

## Validation Plan

List the proof needed before the work can be called done.

## Notes

Record assumptions, open questions, or why direct patching is acceptable.
